説明文: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.
入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Eevee and Drifblim Wonderpick

特性.効果: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, it can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.
